description: Fetches saved posts and reels from Facebook via Graph API, parses and organizes the response into structured metadata (type, title, thumbnail URL, source link, date saved), and presents a clean summary to the user

example_response.summary: A brief summary of the fetched saved items

items.id: Unique identifier of the saved item
items.title: Title or caption snippet of the content
items.thumbnail: URL to the thumbnail or preview image
items.sourceUrl: Direct link to the original Facebook post or reel
items.dateSaved: Date the item was saved in ISO format
items.author: Name of the original poster or creator
